The industry problem

Most agencies run on platforms
built for compliance, not relationships

Applied Epic charges $300 per user per month and takes 18 months to implement. HawkSoft has no engagement automation. EZLynx locks you into annual contracts. None were designed with the client experience at the center.

Overpriced and overbuilt
Legacy platforms charge $200 to $350 per user per month for features most agencies never use, locked into multi-year contracts.
No engagement automation
Your AMS stores policy data but does nothing with it. Renewal reminders, birthday cards, and follow-ups all fall on the agent manually.
Fragmented toolstack
SMS through Twilio, email through Mailchimp, booking through Calendly. No connection, no automation, no shared client view.
15 to 20% book lost annually
Agencies that rely on manual processes lose clients every year to competitors who simply stayed in touch at the right time.
Platform features

Everything your agency needs.
Nothing you don't.

AI Assistant
Agency overview

Your entire book at a glance

The agency dashboard gives owners and producing principals a real-time view of the full portfolio. Total clients, renewals, open quotes, and book value. Client growth charted over time. Retention health by agent. All in one screen.

Toggle between Agency view and My Book with one click
Engage any client directly from the dashboard sidebar
Renewal pipeline, at-risk flags, and agent retention scores always visible
Light and dark mode with preference saved per user
Team management

See every agent's performance in one table

The performance screen gives agency owners a ranked view of the entire team. Clients, book value, retention rate, renewals due, campaigns sent, open rate, and a performance badge for each agent. Spot who needs coaching before it costs you a renewal.

Per-agent retention rates with color-coded progress bars
Performance badges: Top, Strong, Average, Needs Help
Agency retention trend chart across the last 6 months
Total book value, average retention, and headcount at a glance
Engagement automation

Campaigns running 24/7 without lifting a finger

Every active campaign shows enrolled clients, step completion, channel, last sent date, and live status. Four active campaigns with 693 total sends and a 67% average open rate is what production looks like in COVIX.AI.

Email, SMS, WhatsApp, and all-channel campaigns
Triggered by policy events, dates, or AI-detected signals
Pause, resume, and customize any campaign at any time
Completion tracking shows where clients drop off in each sequence
YOGO CX lifecycle engine

Five default playbooks. Activate in one click.

The Playbooks screen is powered by the YOGO CX lifecycle engine. Default sequences for new client welcome, renewal, birthday, payment reminders, and cross-sell are pre-built and ready. Agents customize them, owners promote the best ones agency-wide.

New Client Welcome, Renewal Sequence, Birthday and Milestones, Payment Reminder, Cross-Sell Coverage Gap
Visual step flow showing every channel touchpoint in sequence
Customize any default playbook without losing the original
My Playbooks tab for custom agent-built sequences
AI-powered intelligence

Ask anything about your portfolio

The COVIX.AI Assistant analyzes your live client data and gives specific, actionable answers. Real clients, real renewal dates, real health scores. Ask a question and get a prioritized action list in seconds.

Identifies critical-risk and moderate-risk clients by name
Recommends specific next steps for each at-risk account
Drafts personalized emails and WhatsApp messages on request
Full conversation history saved per agent and agency scope
Powered by YOGO CX

The client lifecycle, fully automated

Every client moves through six phases. COVIX.AI triggers the right engagement at each stage automatically.

YOGO CX lifecycle phases
1
Consider
Lead nurture, pipeline entry
2
Purchase
Policy bound, welcome sequence
3
Onboard
Docs sent, 30-day check-in
4
Adopt
Birthdays, life events, check-ins
5
Expand
Cross-sell, upsell, referrals
6
Renew
90-60-30-7 day sequences
